channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SPLPETRO] Supreme Petrochem Board Recommends ","8/Share Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Supreme Petrochem's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 24, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board recommended a final dividend of ","8 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for July 14, 2026. The record date for the dividend is July 14, 2026, with payment on or after August 1, 2026. Additionally, the Board approved the reappointment of Shri N. Gopal as Manager for a further three years, effective April 20, 2026, also subject to AGM approval.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ","8 per equity share for the financial year FY26.
  • The 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM) is scheduled for July 14, 2026.
  • Dividend record date is July 14, 2026, with payment on or after August 1, 2026.
  • Shri N. Gopal reappointed as Manager for a further three-year term.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUPREME PETROCHEM LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SPLPETRO] SPL Petro Recommends ₹8 Final Dividend, Declares Q4/FY26 Results
item.description:
Supreme Petrochem Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Concurrently, the Board recommended a final dividend of ₹8 per equity share for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This dividend is subject to approval by members at the upcoming 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for Tuesday, July 14, 2026. The record date for determining eligible shareholders for the final dividend is also July 14, 2026, with payment expected on or after August 1, 2026. Additionally, the Board approved the re-appointment of Shri N. Gopal as Manager for a further period of approximately three years, from April 20, 2026, to March 31, 2029, pending shareholder approval at the AGM.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹8 per equity share for FY26.
  • Record date for final dividend is July 14, 2026.
  • Dividend payment will be made on or after August 1, 2026.
  • 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held on July 14, 2026.
  • Shri N. Gopal re-appointed as Manager for three years, subject to AGM approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUPREME PETROCHEM LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [IDBI] IDBI Bank clarifies on strategic disinvestment news
item.description:
IDBI Bank clarified a news report regarding its strategic disinvestment, stating that the process is confidential and being undertaken by the Government of India (GOI). The bank is not in a position to confirm or deny the news. It emphasized that the disinvestment is a competitive bidding process, not involving negotiations by the bank. IDBI Bank reiterated its past disclosures, including the in-principle approval for strategic disinvestment, appointment of transaction advisors, the proposed sale of 30.48% by GOI and 30.24% by LIC, and SEBI approvals for re-classification of GOI and LIC as public shareholders post-sale. The bank confirmed it has not received any new communication from GOI regarding the current status and will promptly disclose any material information.

  • IDBI Bank cannot confirm or deny strategic disinvestment news.
  • Disinvestment is a confidential GOI competitive bidding process.
  • Bank has no role in the disinvestment negotiations.
  • Previous disclosures include GOI/LIC stake sale and SEBI approvals.
  • Bank awaits further communication from GOI on disinvestment status.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IDBI BANK LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [PGCRL] Pearl Green Clubs: FY26 Results Approved, Capital Doubled to ₹10 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Pearl Green Clubs and Resorts Ltd's Board approved its standalone audited financial results for the half year and financial year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion. The board also approved increasing the authorized share capital from ₹5 crore to ₹10 crore, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, Ms. Durga Kumar Modi was appointed as an Additional Independent Director, while Ms. Sayli Akshay Shelke resigned from her Independent Director position, effective April 24, 2026. A postal ballot notice will be issued for member approvals.

  • Board approved standalone audited financial results for FY26.
  • Authorized share capital increased from ₹5 Cr to ₹10 Cr.
  • Ms. Durga Kumar Modi appointed as Additional Independent Director.
  • Ms. Sayli Akshay Shelke resigned as Independent Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pearl Green Clubs and Resorts Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CANFINHOME] Can Fin Homes Recommends ₹8/Share Final Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Can Fin Homes Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 24, 2026, recommended a final dividend of ₹8.00 per equity share (face value ₹2) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This, combined with the interim dividend of ₹7.00 per share, brings the total dividend for FY26 to ₹15.00 per equity share. The recommendation is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The Board also approved the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and full financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the resignation of Shri Vikram Saha as Deputy Managing Director was noted, and Shri Shailesh Kumar Singh was approved as an Additional Director and Whole Time Director (Deputy Managing Director), pending RBI approval.

  • Board recommended a final dividend of ₹8.00 per equity share.
  • Total dividend for FY26 stands at ₹15.00 per share.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 were approved.
  • Shri Vikram Saha resigned as Deputy Managing Director.
  • Shri Shailesh Kumar Singh appointed Deputy Managing Director, subject to RBI approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAN FIN HOMES LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SPLPETRO] SPL Petrochem Q4/FY26 Results: Board Recommends ₹8/Share Dividend
item.description:
Supreme Petrochem Ltd's Board of Directors approved the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also recommended a final dividend of ₹8 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM). The AGM is scheduled for Tuesday, July 14, 2026, with the same date set as the record date for the final dividend. Payment, if approved, will be made on or after August 1, 2026. Additionally, the board approved the re-appointment of Shri N. Gopal as Manager for a further period of approximately three years, effective April 20, 2026, to March 31, 2029, also subject to AGM approval.

  • Board approved Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Final dividend of ₹8 per equity share recommended for FY26.
  • 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held on July 14, 2026.
  • Record date for final dividend is July 14, 2026.
  • Shri N. Gopal re-appointed as Manager for a three-year term.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUPREME PETROCHEM LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SPLPETRO] Supreme Petrochem Recommends ","8 Final Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Supreme Petrochem Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 24, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial statements and results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Concurrently, the Board recommended a final dividend of ","8 per equity share for FY26. This dividend is contingent on shareholder approval at the 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for July 14, 2026. The record date for determining eligible shareholders for the dividend is also July 14, 2026, with payment expected on or after August 1, 2026, if approved. Additionally, the Board approved the reappointment of Shri N. Gopal as Manager for a further three-year term, effective April 20, 2026, subject to AGM approval.

  • Board recommended a final dividend of ","8 per equity share for FY2026.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM on July 14, 2026.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is July 14, 2026.
  • Payment of dividend, if approved, will be on or after August 1, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 were also approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUPREME PETROCHEM LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [KINETRU] Kinetic Trust Board to meet on May 1 for FY26 results & director appointment
item.description:
Kinetic Trust Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 1, 2026, at 3:00 P.M. The meeting's agenda includes considering and approving the audited financial statements for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider the appointment of Mr. Sumit Kumar Jha (DIN: 10547500) as an Additional Director (Independent) of the Company. The meeting will take place at the company's corporate office in New Delhi.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 1, 2026.
  • To consider and approve audited Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • To consider appointing Mr. Sumit Kumar Jha as an Independent Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KINETIC TRUST LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SIGNATURE] Signatureglobal buys 1.28 acres in Gurugram with 0.10 mn sq ft potential
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Signatureglobal (India) Ltd has executed two sale deeds on April 24, 2026, to purchase land parcels totaling approximately 1.28 acres. These lands are situated in Sector-71 on Southern Peripheral Road, Village Fazilpur Jharsa, Tehsil Badshahpur & District Gurugram, Haryana. These acquired parcels are part of a larger 4.26-acre collaboration, with the company intending to acquire the remaining 2.98 acres in due course. The 1.28 acres acquired have an overall potential developable area of approximately 0.10 million square feet, contributing to the company's future development pipeline.

  • Signatureglobal acquired 1.28 acres of land in Gurugram.
  • The acquired land has 0.10 million sq ft developable potential.
  • It is part of a larger 4.26-acre collaboration project.
  • Company plans to acquire the remaining 2.98 acres soon.
  • Expands land bank for future real estate development.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Signatureglobal (India) Ltd | Category: Property

item.title: [TANLA] Tanla Platforms Declares ₹6 Interim Dividend for FY26; Record Date Apr 30
item.description:
Tanla Platforms Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 24, 2026, has declared a second interim dividend of ₹6 per equity share for the financial year 2025-26. This represents a 600% dividend on the face value of Re.1/- per share. The company has set Thursday, April 30, 2026, as the Record Date to determine the shareholders entitled to receive this dividend. This declaration is in compliance with Regulation 30 and 42 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board declared ₹6 second interim dividend for FY26.
  • Dividend represents 600% on Re.1/- face value.
  • Record date for dividend entitlement is April 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tanla Platforms Ltd | Category: Dividend
